text.title: Agent Eval Harness Bootstrap Recipe Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-eval-harness-bootstrap-recipe is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Judge gives 4/5 to one trajectory and 4/5 to another; the two are clearly different.
antipattern.reason: No 1-5 anchors; judge interprets scale loosely.

antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r3: every failure captures inputs to a deterministic replay.

antipattern.description: Total pass-rate looks fine, but the 'tool-use' subset is broken.
